projects.title: Projects
projects.heading: Selected work
projects.subtitle: Each project represents a unique challenge and a carefully crafted solution.

alphaFlask.title: Alpha Inventory
alphaFlask.description: Inventory management web app built with Flask.
alphaFlask.longDescription: Alpha Inventory is a web application for inventory management in physical stores/businesses where I developed the backend. This project was created as the final deliverable for my Software Design and Development training at the National Institute of Professional Technical Training in the Dominican Republic.

alphaDjango.title: Alpha Inventory
alphaDjango.description: Inventory management web app built with Django.
alphaDjango.longDescription: Alpha Inventory is a web application for inventory management in physical stores/businesses where I developed the backend. This is a variant of the project developed in Django.

echotest.title: Echotest
echotest.description: Automated Java program evaluation system built in Python.
echotest.longDescription: Echotest is a system developed in Python that allows automatic evaluation of Java programs. The system compiles, runs structure and compilation tests, and compares the outputs generated by the Java program with the expected results, showing in detail which tests passed and which did not.

prestamosMobile.title: Prestamos Taveras Mobile
prestamosMobile.description: Mobile app for loan management built with React Native + Expo and a decoupled backend.
prestamosMobile.longDescription: Prestamos Taveras is a mobile application with a decoupled backend. This app allows users to authenticate via JWT and view the current status of their loans and request new loans.

prestamosBackend.title: Prestamos Taveras Backend
prestamosBackend.description: REST API for the loan management mobile app built with Django + DRF.
prestamosBackend.longDescription: REST API that exposes the endpoints for the mobile app to communicate with the database.

nexus.title: Nexus Inventory
nexus.description: Enterprise inventory management web app built with Django + DRF and HTML + CSS + JS.
nexus.longDescription: Nexus Inventory is a web application for enterprise management that provides centralized control over inventory, sales, purchases, returns, customers, and suppliers. The system is divided into Administrator, Cashier, and Purchasing/Sales Manager roles. I developed the backend and the Fetch communication between the frontend and backend. This project is a monorepo.
